settings.title: Free Portraits for the Animal Shelter
settings.excerpt: A good photo can be the difference between an overlooked dog and one that finds a home.
settings.body:
We have spent a few Saturdays this winter at the county shelter with our lights and a lot of patience.

Shelter listings live or die on their photos. A dog shot in a dim kennel looks frightened, the same dog shot with a little care looks like family. The difference shows up in how fast they get adopted.

We are donating one morning a month through the year to photograph animals waiting for homes. If you have ever met a pet through a screen first, you know exactly why this matters to us.
